title: Edhuku Machan Kadhalu Lyrics Mapla Singam
stanzas: <div>Edhuku Machan Kadhalu Lyrics Mapla Singam

Edhuku machan kadhalu
venaam venaam novalu
kaavu vaangum kadhal mela
kollaatha nee aavalu.(2)

enaku venum kadhalu
adhula illa modhalu
kaalandhorum kaikodukkum
kanneer thaane angelu

sonnaa kaetka marukkura
summa summa sirikkura
kannpinna aasaiyaala
kaanaa poga nenaikkura

unga pechu pudikkala
summa naanum nadikkala
kadhal ennum kottaiya naan
innum katti mudikkala

Edhuku machan kadhalu
venaam venaam novalu
kaavu vaangum kadhal mela
kollaatha nee aavalu.

enaku venum kadhalu
adhula illa modhalu
kaalandhorum kaikodukkum
kanneer thaane angelu

pozhuthum ponna suththi
thirinjaa unna paththi
ulagam enna sollum
venaam machaa venaamda

podhuvaa ponna paththi
thavara sollum buththi
irukku ungakitta
vaaya moodi poyendaa

mannaadhi mannan ellaam
mannaa poanaan ponnaale
machaan nee ponna
nambi pogaathe.

ammaava vittuputta
onnum maela manmela
summa nee over scenum
podaatha.

pennai naadaathe
pinbu vaadaathe
endru siththarum
solli vaithaare.

pennai neengaathe
pinbu yaengaathe
kannadasan sonnaare

pennaale roatil
ne nikkapora pinnaale.

Edhuku machan kadhalu
venaam venaam novalu
kaavu vaangum kadhal mela
kollaatha nee aavalu.

enaku venum kadhalu
adhula illa modhalu
kaalandhorum kaikodukkum
kanneer thaane angelu

mudhalil kannasaippaa
mudivil kai asaippaa
idhuthaan kadhal ingae
venaam machaa venaamda

azhagaa kai kodupaa
azhutha kan thodaipaa
avalaal naanum ingae
superman-ah aavendaa

laila-vaal majunu ingae
patta paadu podhaathaa
machaan ne kadhal sanga
oodhaathe.

laila-kkal illai endral
indha boomi suththadhe
poiya ne pesi nikka
koodaathe.

palla kaataathe
bulbu vaangaathe endru
solluren kelu machchaane

anbu oayaadhe
kuththam aagaathe
solli kadhal seivaene

pennaale oppaari
vaikkapora pinnaale.

Edhuku machan kadhalu
venaam venaam novalu
kaavu vaangum kadhal mela
kollaatha nee aavalu.(2)

enaku venum kadhalu
adhula illa modhalu
kaalandhorum kaikodukkum
kanneer thaane angelu

sonnaa kaetka marukkura
summa summa sirikkura
kannpinna aasaiyaala
kaanaa poga nenaikkura

unga pechu pudikkala
summa naanum nadikkala
kadhal ennum kottaiya naan
innum katti mudikkala

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Edhuku Machan Kadhalu expresses the playful and light-hearted aspects of love, highlighting the joy and excitement that comes with it.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Mapla Singam, this song showcases a fun and romantic moment between the lead characters, emphasizing their chemistry and carefree spirit.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Aalap Raju and Velmurugan, who bring a lively energy to the track.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Edhuku Machan Kadhalu was composed by N. R. Raghunanthan, known for his catchy and engaging compositions.

When was this song released?

This lively track was released on March 11, 2016, adding to the vibrant soundtrack of Mapla Singam.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Edhuku Machan Kadhalu, the playful banter between the singers encapsulates the carefree spirit of young love. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics make it a perfect fit for celebratory occasions, reflecting the joy and excitement of romance. As the characters in Mapla Singam navigate their feelings, this track serves as a delightful backdrop to their adventures. The infectious energy of the song is sure to uplift anyone's mood and get them dancing.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Edhuku Machan Kadhalu from Mapla Singam is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, brought to life by the dynamic voices of Aalap Raju and Velmurugan. This upbeat track, composed by N. R. Raghunanthan, perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the thrill of romance. Get ready to dance along as this song elevates your spirits and fills the air with positivity!
stanzaMeanings: I don't want love, it only brings pain. Don't let love take over you.
I want love, but it doesn't exist. Even those who are in love shed tears.
When I say something, you don't listen. You just smile and seem to be lost in your own thoughts.
You don't seem to care about what I say. You just want to see me and that's all you think about.
I don't like your talk, and I won't act like I care. I still haven't finished building the wall of love.
I want love, but it doesn't exist. Even those who are in love shed tears.
When you go around, what will the world say about you? I don't want to hear it, man, just leave it.
People will talk about you, but I won't listen to it. Just keep your mouth shut and go away.
The king of kings has gone away, don't trust in a girl, man.
Don't act like you're above everyone else, just because you have a good scene.
Don't chase after girls, they will say you are a fool.
Don't let love go away, just keep it close to your heart.
I don't want love, it only brings pain. Don't let love take over you.
I want love, but it doesn't exist. Even those who are in love shed tears.
In the beginning, there is a longing, and in the end, there is a desire. This is why I don't want love, man.
Will she give her hand beautifully? If she does, I will become a superman here.
Don't sing songs about love, man, just don't do it.
If there are no girls, this world will not spin. Don't talk nonsense.
Don't show off, don't buy a bulb, I'm telling you, listen, man.
Don't let love go away, just keep it close to your heart.
I don't want love, it only brings pain. Don't let love take over you.
I want love, but it doesn't exist. Even those who are in love shed tears.
When I say something, you don't listen. You just smile and seem to be lost in your own thoughts.
I don't like your talk, and I won't act like I care. I still haven't finished building the wall of love.
